note: This is a REFERENCE artifact — not a build target. It describes what sms-service does as a product, organized by user value and conceptual area. The engine MUST NOT attempt to enrich or score this domain against source code. It is an intentionally authored document.
reading_rule: Read this domain before planning any implementation phase. It defines what green-ai must understand conceptually — product areas, design decisions, and what NOT to copy from sms-service.
